/usr/bin/cc -O2 -g -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pico_baton.dir/baton_app/baton_app.c.o -o pico_baton  libpicoquic-log.a libpicoquic-core.a libpicohttp-core.a libpicoquic-core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so _deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-openssl.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl _deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-fusion.a _deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-minicrypto.a _deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-core.a
